lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: 'Ello, and what are you after then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need another assignment.

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: You're actually very strong, are you sure you don't want Vannaka under Edgeville to assign you a task?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No that's okay, I'll take a task from you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh okay then, I'll go talk to Vannaka.

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: Excellent, you're doing great. Your new task is to kill [amount] [task monster].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any tips for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, great!

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: Good luck! Don't forget to come back when you need a new assignment.

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: You're still hunting [task monster], you have [amount] to go. Come back when you've finished your task.

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: You're still hunting [monster], with [amount] to go.

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: I don't think that's a suitable task for you. Shall I cancel it? This will not wipe your task streaks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please cancel it.

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: Alright, consider the task cancelled. You can now get a new assignment when you want one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thanks, I want to try doing it.

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: Good luck with that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any rewards for me, or anything to trade?

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: I have quite a few rewards you can earn, and a wide variety of Slayer equipment for sale.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about the difficulty of my assignments.

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: The Slayer Masters may currently assign you any task in our lists, regardless of your combat level.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's fine - I can handle any task.

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: That's the spirit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In future, please don't give anything too tough.

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: The Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's fine - I don't want anything too tough.

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: Okay, we'll keep checking your combat level.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stop checking my combat level - I can take anything!

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will assign you anything from their lists, regardless of your combat level.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're filling in for Mazchna?

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: Indeed I am. It's been a while since he last asked me to step in, but it's good to get out and see the sights, to meet mortals and to generally socialise.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So do you know Mazchna well?

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: Oh, yes, he's such a mine of information. He hears what's going on at the pub, listens to the gossip of passing adventurers, and now he's off on a great adventure himself.

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: Though, of course, you know that already. Sorry to babble on. I'm sure you have plenty of other things to be doing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... Nothing...

lines.speaker: Achtryn
lines.text: 'Ello, can I help you?
